title: Add sports photos and nearby academy locations

requirements.text: Display high-quality photos for each sport category throughout the website

quotes: Add photos for the sports in this website

acceptanceCriteria: Each sport category has an associated photo displayed
Photos are visually appealing and relevant to the specific sport
Images load efficiently and are properly sized for their containers

requirements.text: Display nearby academy places with their locations on the website
acceptanceCriteria: Academy locations are displayed on the website
Each academy shows its name and location information
Academies are organized in a user-friendly layout

requirements.text: Render all generated sport category images and academy location images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are stored in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Images are referenced correctly in components
All sport and academy images display without errors

nonGoals: Real-time GPS tracking or geolocation features
Interactive maps with pins or markers

required: Action photo of basketball game with players jumping (basketball.dim_800x600.png)
Soccer players in action on field (soccer.dim_800x600.png)
Swimming pool with swimmer doing freestyle (swimming.dim_800x600.png)
Outdoor sports complex with multiple fields (academy-3.dim_600x400.png)
